footer.tagline: A Google Sheets add-on for currency conversion. Free to install, no account needed.

hero.label: Google Sheets Add-on
hero.title: Convert currencies in your spreadsheet without the busywork
hero.body: Instant Currency writes converted values directly into your cells with correct formatting. 160+ currencies. Historical rates going back decades. No formulas to maintain.
hero.screenshotAlt: The Instant Currency sidebar open in Google Sheets, converting USD amounts to multiple currencies including EUR, GBP, JPY, BRL, MXN, and ILS

showcase.formattingAlt: Spreadsheet with automatic currency formatting applied to yen, dollars, rupees, euros, pounds, Swiss francs, and Korean won
showcase.datePickerAlt: Instant Currency date picker for selecting historical exchange rates, showing February 2024 calendar

capabilities.label: What you get
capabilities.title: Everything the GOOGLEFINANCE function should have been
capabilities.valuesBody: Converted amounts are written as plain numbers. They don't update behind your back, error out randomly, or break when you copy a sheet.
capabilities.formattingBody: Yen gets zero decimals. Swiss francs get apostrophe separators. Rupees use the lakh system. Each currency's display rules are applied to the cell.
capabilities.currenciesBody: Every major currency and most minor ones. If it has an ISO 4217 code and a reliable exchange rate source, it's in the list.
capabilities.historicalBody: Pick any date going back decades and convert at that day's exchange rate. Useful for expense reports, audits, and invoice reconciliation.
capabilities.sheetBody: Convert a selection of cells or toggle on whole-sheet mode to convert every value in the active sheet at once.
capabilities.formulaBody: Prefer live-updating formulas? Toggle the GOOGLEFINANCE option to insert formulas instead of hardcoded values.

personas.label: Built for
personas.title: People who work across borders
personas.pmBody: Budgets, vendor quotes, and expense reports arrive in different currencies. You need everything in one base currency for stakeholder reporting. This does that in seconds.
personas.financeBody: Month-end close with international subsidiaries. Consolidating invoices, payroll, and vendor payments across currencies into a single reporting workbook.
personas.travelBody: Tracking trip expenses across countries. Logging costs in local currencies and converting them to your home currency to see actual spending.

cta.title: Try Instant Currency
cta.body: Install from the Google Workspace Marketplace. Free with no account or sign-up required. Convert your first cell in under a minute.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Free to use, with no conversion limits
pricing.subtitle: The core add-on is completely free. Pro adds historical exchange rates and priority support for $5/month, cancel anytime.

free.feature5: Convert selected cells or entire sheets

pro.emailHint: Use the same email you use with Google Sheets.
pro.feature2: Historical exchange rates for any date

success.title: You're all set
success.subtitle: Your Pro subscription is active. Historical exchange rates and priority support are now available.
success.step1: Go back to your Google Sheets spreadsheet
success.step2: Close the Instant Currency sidebar if it's open
success.step3: Reopen it from Extensions → Instant Currency → Open sidebar
success.step4: The date picker for historical rates will now be enabled
